name: wekelea-monorepo
description: Fast Peer-to-Peer Social Escrow Contract Platform

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
